ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* The position of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* The height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* The weight of the player in pounds */,
  "dob" TEXT /* The date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" TEXT /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* The round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_number" TEXT /* The draft number of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* The college the player attended */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* The conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* The division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* The name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* The capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "founded_year" TEXT /* The year the team was founded */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* The URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* The score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* The score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of attendees at the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location where the game was played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee who officiated the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the stats were recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player to whom the stats belong */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played by the player */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field Goals Made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field Goals Attempted */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field Goal Percentage */,
  "fg3m" INTEGER /* Three-Point Field Goals Made */,
  "fg3a" INTEGER /* Three-Point Field Goals Attempted */,
  "fg3_pct" REAL /* Three-Point Field Goal Percentage */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free Throws Made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free Throws Attempted */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free Throw Percentage */,
  "oreb" INTEGER /* Offensive Rebounds */,
  "dreb" INTEGER /* Defensive Rebounds */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Total Rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal Fouls */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points Scored */,
  "eff" INTEGER /* Efficiency Rating */,
  "ast_tov" INTEGER /* Assist to Turnover Ratio */,
  "stl_tov" REAL /* Steal to Turnover Ratio */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* The plus-minus rating of the player for the game */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* The number of double-doubles */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* The number of triple-doubles */,
  "double_triples" INTEGER /* The number of quadruple-doubles */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* The fantasy points scored by the player in the game */,
  "clutch_points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the last 5 minutes of the game or overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach manages */,
  "position" TEXT /* The position of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* The number of years of coaching experience */,
  "highest_level_coached" TEXT /* The highest level of basketball the coach has coached */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* The coach's record */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any coaching awards received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* The number of teams in the league for the season */,
  "playoff_teams" INTEGER /* The number of teams that qualify for the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "finals_mvp_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the player who won the Finals MVP */,
  "regular_season_mvp_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the player who won the Regular Season MVP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the playoff game belongs to */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the playoffs */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the playoff game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* The score of the home team in the playoff game */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* The score of the away team in the playoff game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the playoff game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of attendees at the playoff game */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location where the playoff game was played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee who officiated the playoff game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the award */,
  "awardee_type" TEXT /* The type of awardee (e.g., Player, Coach, Team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics_aggregates" (
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregate record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "total_gp" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player */,
  "total_pts" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "total_reb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "total_ast" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "total_stl" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player */,
  "total_blk" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player */,
  "total_eff" REAL /* Total efficiency rating */,
  "total_doubles" INTEGER /* The total number of double-doubles */,
  "total_triple_doubles" INTEGER /* The total number of triple-doubles */,
  "total_double_triples" INTEGER /* The total number of quadruple-doubles */,
  "total_fantasy_points" REAL /* The total fantasy points scored */,
  "total_clutch_points" INTEGER /* The total points scored in clutch situations */,
  "total_plus_minus" REAL /* The total plus-minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_aggregates_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_aggregates_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the injury */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the injury */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* The current recovery status */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* The number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Total likes received by the player */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Total shares of the player’s content */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Total comments on the player’s content */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* The number of followers the player has on social media */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* The type of engagement */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* The date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_source" TEXT /* The source of the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
